review_title: Accurate time tracking that fits perfectly into my workflow
description: I am satisfied with using Trackabi. It accurately tracks my time (with some room for error) and allows me to summarise my time and work during my daily standups with my manager.
author: Arghadeep D.
pros: This tool does exactly what I need , it tracks my time and productivity accurately. I appreciate that it isn't overly intrusive and offers the flexibility to manually log my hours, which is especially useful if I work overtime or am offline. It helps me stay focused throughout the day and makes it easy to review how I've spent my time after a long workday. Setting it up and integrating it into my workflow was straightforward, with minimal steps required. For my needs, simply starting Trackabi from the command line is sufficient. At the moment, I use it daily in accordance with my company's policies to monitor my time and productivity. It also makes it easier for me to summarize my completed tasks during daily standups with my manager. I also liked the customer support I recieved during my inital setup of trackabi - they were fast and also helped me set it up real quick
cons: Currently, there is no way to delete a screenshot once it has been taken. At times, I prefer not to have certain things on my laptop screen, like chats or emails, included in these captures. This brings up concerns about confidentiality, and I am left wondering what the company does with the large volume of screenshots it collects each day. I have also noticed that Trackabi sometimes records time inaccurately, even when my laptop is closed. Although I can remove the unnecessary logged time, I think this is a bug that the company should look into. Another issue I've experienced is that when I use Trackabi alongside many other windows or Chrome tabs, my laptop occasionally freezes or stops responding. This problem does not occur when Trackabi is turned off.

review_title: Easy to use and provides a detailed overview on time spent
description: It was easy to implement and so far it has been easy use. I can create new projects, add new clients and onboard new members with ease.
author: Vivian A.
pros: I love that I can track time spent based on Members, projects and even clients. This allows me to see a comprehensive overview of total time spent by employees. Hence, I am able to plan efficiently.
cons: There are no cons that I can think of. The website is great and I highly recommend them to anyone looking for a good Time tracking app.

author: Gonçalo M.
pros: Time clock it's nice. Nice to have the possibility to select my leaves.
cons: The Time tracking never work as it should. Snapshots it's agressive.

review_title: Helpful Tool for Managing Work Time
description: Overall, my experience with Trackabi has been positive. It’s easy to use, helps keep work time organized, and improves productivity. While there are a few areas that could be improved, it does a good job of simplifying time tracking and project management.
author: anita V.
pros: I really like how simple and user-friendly Trackabi is. The time tracking is easy to use, the interface is clean, and it helps me stay organized without feeling complicated. It saves time and makes tracking work much more efficient.
cons: The platform can feel a bit slow at times, and some features are not very intuitive at first. The reporting and customization options could be more advanced, especially for larger teams.

review_title: Excellent Time Tracking for Solopreneurs and Teams
description: Trackabi has become one of my favorite tools for time tracking. As a solopreneur, I rely on it daily to stay organized and manage my work efficiently. What really impressed me is that one of my clients, who runs a trades business, started using Trackabi to oversee his teams at multiple job sites — and it’s made a big difference for him, too. The platform is intuitive, feature-rich, and thoughtfully designed. Whether you’re a solo professional or managing a team, Trackabi offers a seamless, dependable solution for keeping time and tasks on track.
author: Toni R.
pros: It allows for high level entries as well as extremely granular details all with a low to moderate learning curve.
cons: I wish I had been told to create templates first and then copy and reuse

review_title: Great value for money. Excellent time tracker
description: It provides good insights in my staff's productivity as well as allows detailed billing towards my clients. It provided good value and is quite straightforward to implement.
author: Jachim G.
pros: Trackabi offers a great time tracker. It is relatively straightforward to implement and has a lot of functionality. It allowed me to get a much better overview of my team's overall productivity.
cons: However, the Company can improve its customer service by organizing product demo's on the request by the client instead of trying to resolve all technical issues by email. In addition, 1 of the biggest limitations is that you can create multiple clients but can't assign the same tasks to them. It would require you to duplicate projects and assign it to each client. I run an accounting practice, and I have the same tasks across all my clients. It is time-consuming and prone to error if I have to create projects for each new customer in order to have a workaround for this lacking feature.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We’ve tested multiple time-tracking tools, but Trackabi stands out. As the founder of Majestic Virtual Assistants, I needed something that didn’t require a complicated setup yet offered the insights I needed to audit hours across multiple VAs. Trackabi delivers exactly that. My team finds it easy to use, and I love how detailed the reporting is. It’s become an essential part of how we operate.
author: Majesty A.
pros: Easy to use, the team love it and most importantly, it's inexpensive. All of my team members are currently using Trackabi.
cons: Sometimes its lagging in mac users. Unable to filter multiple people at the same time in the timesheet reporting.

description: The tracking system is functioning effectively, accurately monitoring the timing of employees’ activities, including leave approval processes for both paid and unpaid leave.
author: Dhanraj P.
pros: The user interface is intuitive and user-friendly. The software has been bug-free since its release, and I have not encountered any issues during my usage.
cons: Nothing till now. To date, we have received regular updates from Trackabi. Nothing bad!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I would recommend Trackabi to any company looking to manage time for their team members and/or manage projects.
author: Rob H.
pros: The interface is simple, easy to use and easy to manage.
cons: Sometimes the screenshots and app use detail seems to lag or not work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's a really good application actually I can manage my working time for a whole week by looking at the timesheets. It also help me to track my working time for a balance working time leisure time daily.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The most I like about Trackabi it's really useful not only to track my time for my boss it also good for me to manage my time and keep in track my work
cons: The part that I don't like is whenever my network is not stable the tracked time sometimes rolled back couple minutes I guess before screen capture, and the start button is not directly start after I click it.

description: My overall experience with Trackabi has been really good, it has really helped me find out the gaps in my work during the day, and helps me figure out which areas I need to improve in.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The thing that I like the most about Trackabi is that it does exactly what its supposed to do, nothing more, nothing less. And, als0 the ease of use.
cons: Trackabi sometimes increases the CPU utilisation which can cause my machine to perform slowly especially when Im working on multiple tasks at once.

description: I'm satisfied with Trackabi. It is simple and yet you don't have to go to it's website to see the important details, it is just right there.
author: Lowee Jan Dor A.
pros: The app is user-friendly. The interface is simple. You can see all you need in one dashboard; you don't have to go to its website to see the important stuff.
cons: Sometimes, the monitoring is inaccurate. There were times when the app couldn't recognise some apps.

description: I have a great experience with it since I use it Monday through Friday and has helped me elevate my productivity ever since I started using it.
author: Eric F.
pros: I really like that it helps me see how long I spend working vs. using non-productive apps. It shows me when I get distracted or dip throughout the day.
cons: It can be a little big laggy when clicking on/off for the timer and loading it up, but other than that I don't have any cons for it.

review_title: Well suited for companies for time management and efficiency.
description: Time management, Tracked info about product apps are cool, It was smooth and well suited for Companies,
author: Amirthalingam J.
pros: We can track the usage of the product apps individually. Well suited for companies, and nothing to worry about employees working days.
cons: Sometimes automatically it's getting logged out due to update issues without even notify me. Or if we can work with out internet will be cool.

description: Trackabi is solving the problem of inaccurate and inconsistent time reporting. It helps me log and report my hours accurately while clearly showing how my time is spent across different tasks and projects. This benefits me by making my work more transparent, reducing guesswork when reporting hours, and helping me better understand and manage my productivity.
author: Efe K.
pros: It makes time tracking simple and easy, while running in the background. You can also log your time manually
cons: What I dislike about it is that when logging time using the dialer, it can feel a bit stressful and is prone to errors, especially if you’re trying to be precise or are in a hurry.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with Trackabi has been very positive. The platform is intuitive and easy to navigate, making time tracking and leave management straightforward even for users who aren’t particularly tech-savvy. It offers a solid range of features at a reasonable price, delivering great value for small to mid-sized teams. Overall, it’s a reliable, efficient tool that simplifies day-to-day workforce management.
author: Jean R.
pros: Intuitive interface that makes time tracking and leave management easy, even for non-technical users, with great value for the price.
cons: Advanced customization or reporting options may be limited for larger or more complex organizations.

description: My overall experience with Trackabi has been positive. It’s easy to use and helps me stay organized and Trackabi provides a smooth and reliable experience for time tracking and task management
author: Angelo D.
pros: Trackabi is a well-designed app that provides accurate time tracking and helpful features for daily work management.
cons: The interface could be a little more customizable and Limited advanced features compared to some other tools

review_title: Trackabi in the Workplace: A Comprehensive and Intuitive Work Tracking Tool
description: This application is helping me manage my time more effectively and efficiently, I can easily see how many hours I am productive or unproductive, and that motivates me to stay focused and drives me to become more productive.
author: Rafaela Yvonne S.
pros: What I like best about Trackabi is the drive that it gives me to stay productive, I use it almost daily, and being able to track my work hours (and even my unproductive hours) allows me to stay organized and focused. This is essential to a driven and structured person like me since it helps me not only in managing my tasks but also driving me to become more effective, disciplined, and productive. The application is also very easy to use and not disruptive at all, and its integration to tracking work productivity will be very seamless to anyone who might want to use it.
cons: There is one thing I dislike in Trackabi, its limitation to log other browser activities such as "Udemy" or "Coursera", which are productive sites for taking crash courses on many things. I would love to see the number of hours I've spent on those specific sites rather than being logged as "Google Chrome". And, I believe this more granular tracking for other browser activities will make the application even greater.
author_profession: Lead Electrical Engineer and Senior Technical Consultant
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I've been using Trackabi to manage my team and it's GREAT! I switched from using the Onlinejobs.ph time tracker to Trackabi for more clarity & features and i have not been disappointed. I love the ability to input sick leave, vacation, etc into the tool and for it to keep track. I love that it auto calculates the time they are working. I love the ability to fine tune the tool to stop tracking if there is a lack of movement for X amount of time. I love the that I can get screenshots of my teams monitors and see what they're working on at any given moment. I love that it shows me which applications they are spending the majority of time on.
author: Julian S.
pros: I love the ability to input sick leave, vacation, etc into the tool and for it to keep track. I love that it auto calculates the time they are working. I love the ability to fine tune the tool to stop tracking if there is a lack of movement for X amount of time. I love the that I can get screenshots of my teams monitors and see what they're working on at any given moment. I love that it shows me which applications they are spending the majority of time on.
cons: There is nothing that I dislike about trackabi in particular.

description: This tool has exceeded my expectations, so there is nothing I can complain about. However, I would love to see new features.
author: Anil B.
pros: I love how easy it is to understand and use. The ability to easily create reports have saved me a lot of hours.

review_title: Excellent Time Tracking and Project Management Tool
description: Trackabi has greatly improved our team’s productivity and project management. It’s an essential tool for any business looking to optimize their time tracking and project management processes. Highly recommended!
author: Luka D.
pros: Trackabi has been a game-changer for our team! The most impressive feature is its comprehensive time tracking capabilities, which have significantly streamlined our workflow. The user-friendly interface makes it incredibly easy to log hours, and the detailed reports provide valuable insights into our productivity. Additionally, the project management features are top-notch, allowing us to keep track of tasks, deadlines, and team collaboration effortlessly. The integration with other tools we use, such as Trello and Slack, has made our workflow seamless and more efficient. The customizable invoicing feature is also a huge plus, saving us time and ensuring accuracy.
cons: Honestly, there’s very little to dislike about Trackabi. If I had to point out one thing, it would be that the mobile app could use a bit more functionality. While it’s great for logging hours on the go, having more of the desktop features available on the mobile app would make it perfect. However, this is a minor issue compared to the overall benefits Trackabi provides.

description: Overall, I am satisfied with Trackabi and its features, but as mentioned in the Cons section, some small issues need to be fixed.
author: Sudarson S.
pros: I like the most on Trackabi is its automatic screenshot feature and the daily reminder on email.
cons: Sometimes, the time measurement does not match its logged and active hours, and sometimes, it automatically gets disconnected while other processes are running perfectly, so it is not a network issue.

review_title: Efficient Time tracking app with ticketing
description: It is cost effective but not as user friendly as Jira / Zoho
author: Sujitha M.
pros: 1. Auto on, off timer feature 2. ticketing system 3. leave application and tracking 4. employee / organization management
cons: 1. Timer stopped frequently for some users 2. Tickets are not having auto numbering as in Jira 3. While tracking employee's timer, the current tasks time is not updated to the total time

description: The experience is superb and I will highly recommend Trackabi to other companies for them to track employees' work.
author: Kim B.
pros: The time management and the auto screenshot feature.
cons: Sometimes, setting up the Trackabi as it also encounters errors.

author: Nijie F.
pros: I liked Trackabi's intuitive interface and comprehensive time-tracking features, which made it easy to manage and analyze project hours efficiently.
cons: I found Trackabi's mobile app lacking in functionality compared to its desktop version, making it less convenient for tracking time on the go.
